origin_pulse.name: Origin Pulse
origin_pulse.description: Emit a pulse of pure system energy that restores stability and strengthens resistance.

first_thread.name: First Thread
first_thread.description: Strike with a primordial thread of the original algorithm, dealing clean, pattern-true damage.

proto_loop.name: Proto-Loop
proto_loop.description: Invoke an early recursive pattern that repeats its strike once.

stabilize_core.name: Stabilize Core
stabilize_core.description: Reinforce system integrity, resisting corruption and void-aligned disruptions.

prime_glyph.name: Prime Glyph
prime_glyph.description: Channel a glyph of the original algorithm, enhancing recursion and defensive clarity.

system_recall.name: System Recall
system_recall.description: Restore system order by removing harmful effects and resetting instability.

recursive_bloom.name: Recursive Bloom
recursive_bloom.description: Unfold deeper recursion layers, increasing power with each passing turn.

origin_break.name: Origin Break
origin_break.description: Strike with the force of the original system, dealing immense damage—especially to void or corrupted foes.

first_light.name: First Light
first_light.description: Unleash the primordial light of creation, restoring allies and weakening anomalies.

special.name: Genesis Recall
special.description: A narrative-locked origin command used only by Primacore in scripted encounters.
